channel.title: stats on Random Research Ruminations
channel.description: Recent content in stats on Random Research Ruminations

item.title: Resources for learning (and teaching) statistics
item.description: This is an on-going collection of resources for learning and teaching statistical concepts. This post was last updated on 2020-08-10. Statisticial practices p-hacker app Ned Bicare writes: “I developed an online app that allows to practice creative data analysis and how to polish your p-values. It’s primarily aimed at young researchers who do not have our level of expertise yet, but I guess even old hands might learn one or two new tricks!
